title: Medieval Jerusalem
further_info: Recommended Reading Gutgarts, Anna. Frankish Jerusalem: The Transformation of a Medieval City in the Latin East. Cambridge Studies in Medieval Life and Thought 123. Cambridge: Cambridge University Press, 2024. Pringle, Denys. The Churches of the Crusader Kingdom of Jerusalem. A Corpus 3: The City of Jerusalem. Cambridge: Cambridge Univ. Press, 2007. Sebag Montefiore, Simon. Jerusalem: Die Biographie. Frankfurt am Main: Fischer, 2011.
